reviews.review_title: Racing on rails built by you!
reviews.review_description: Title describes what you basically do. If you were wondering. Now to the grit of it! Before each race starts, you setup the track you and your fellow cats to follow. Connect the track once all stars have been connected. Now the racing. You're goal is to get as much stars as possible! Go to fast and you'll wobble and miss the star. After that rinse and repeat. I haven't tried racing other players but it's cool. I had fun. Although... WHY ISN'T THERE A VOLUME/AUDIO OPTION? The looping music gets noticable as soon as the first loop. And the loud purring before the race is awfully loud. That's my complaint. Good game. Gets annoying from sound. That's why it gets a 4. Insert cat pun here.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your cat-tastic review, dear RPGamer954. We will be making an update this fall and deliver the desired volume / audio option, among a few other things, hopefully making the game closer to purrfect (even though we don't have such legends as John Purrmero, Shigeru Meowmoto or Hideo Nekojima working at our office). And remember, tomorrow is caturday, rejoice! :-) Ps. Do note, that you only need one device to play multiplayer, as the game mode is turn-based, so even a friend who doesn't have a VR device can enjoy the "competitive first-drawing-then-racing-on-rails-with-cats" with you.
